hero.bio: Building modern web experiences with clean code and creative design. Turning ideas into pixel-perfect, performant applications.

about.title: THE SHINOBI BEHIND THE SCREEN
about.bio: I'm a Frontend Developer and UI/UX enthusiast. Not just a developer, but a shinobi of the web, trained through real missions, failed builds, and late-night debugging sessions.

projects.title: StoreIt
projects.subtitle: Cloud Storage Platform
projects.description: Production-grade Google Drive–like app enabling secure file upload, management, sharing, and real-time storage tracking — built on Next.js 15 & React 19 with a polished, fully responsive UI.

projects.title: Creative Haven
projects.subtitle: Privacy-First Creator Platform
projects.description: Pseudonymous social platform for creators to showcase work and collaborate locally — engineered with geospatial PostGIS queries, multi-layer Redis caching, and full TypeScript coverage.

projects.title: Wander Way
projects.subtitle: AI Travel Planner
projects.description: AI-powered itinerary generator that creates personalized, budget-optimized travel plans with day-wise schedules and detailed cost breakdowns.

projects.title: Voice of Words
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Document Conversation Platform
projects.description: Production-grade app enabling users to upload any document (PDF, DOCX, TXT, XML) and hold natural voice or text conversations about it with an AI assistant — featuring per-document AI summaries (key ideas, concepts, highlights) with PDF export, smart search, and AI-generated book covers, all behind Clerk-authenticated routes.

projects.title: CineMetrics
projects.subtitle: Movie Analytics Engine
projects.description: Data-driven movie discovery platform that visualizes trends, ratings, and comparisons through interactive dashboards.

projects.title: Nxt Watch
projects.subtitle: Video Streaming Platform
projects.description: Full-featured YouTube-like app with authentication, video playback, trending feeds, and saved videos functionality.

projects.title: EBank
projects.subtitle: Secure Auth System
projects.description: Banking-style authentication system featuring JWT login, protected routes, and secure session management.

projects.title: StockPulse
projects.subtitle: Stock Tracking Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time stock market tracker with search, watchlist, and dynamic price visualization.
